g.text: Provides a common script editor for script based plug-ins
Provides a default model for variable based plug-ins
Provides a common base class for variable based plug-ins
Adds a model class for saving/loading capability
Base class for implementing a builder UI
Adds a relationship between the builder UI and the runner
Base interface for creating a UI
to build a particular type of PACZ
Interface for execution of a PACZ.
This interface is simple, no abstract base class needed
